text: Lagta hai khud ko tum ab bekaar maanne lagi ho, aur saath mein yeh bhi hai ki madad maangne par sharm ka bojh bhi chipak gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke thoda halka laga. Par phir bhi seene mein dabaav rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ke despair ko validate karna dependent-label culture se, worth alag rakhna.
text: Jo ehsaas tum bol rahi ho woh bilkul samajhne layak hai, khaaskar jahan buzurg ko dependent maan liya jaye aur phir ek baat dil par chhuri ban jaye. Tumhari keemat kisi label se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Samajh aa raha hai. Phir bhi kabhi kabhi dil baith gaya sa lagta hai aur bas rona aa jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar systemic anecdote dekar batana ki yeh pattern common hai.
text: Sheher se judi hui baatein aksar family mein galti tarah chipak jati hain — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki izzat aur buzurgi dono ka darr hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, ab kya karoon? Kuch aisa jo main abhi kar sakun, bina jhagde ke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness par char halke, short options dena jo duty-compatible hon.
text: Tumhare liye char halke kadam: (1) paani ka ek glass dheere se. (2) Line likho: "abhi main sirf sambhal rahi hoon." (3) Paanch slow saans. (4) Agar baat aage badhe toh pause line: "abhi nahi, baad mein."

speaker: Seeker
text: Pause line acchi lagi. Turant jawab dena padta hai aur phir aur toot sa lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Line + breathing ko aaj ke liye step-by-step lock karna.
text: Kagaz par pehle apni line likho, phir tin gahri saans lo, phir line ek baar zor se padh lo. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kar liya. Thoda control laga, warna bas behosh sa feel ho raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Thanda sharir aur ghabrahat ko overload signal ke roop mein reframe karna.
text: Gahri saans lena shuru karna body ko signal deta hai ki abhi full danger har second nahi hai. Thanda padna bhi kabhi-kabhi overload ka hissa hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Signal wali baat samajh aa gayi. Isse guilt thoda kam ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chhota step lene ko validate karna.
text: Tumne bina zor ke jo chhota kadam uthaya hai, woh tumhari himmat dikhata hai, kamzori nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kabhi kabhi wave phir aati hai aur dil phir baith sa lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Wave ke liye ninety-second fallback dena.
text: Palat aaye agar panic phir se, yeh mini sequence lo: tees second rukna, tees second saans, tees second line "sirf yeh pal."

speaker: Seeker
text: Sirf yeh pal wali line yaad rahegi. Isse thoda settle hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Kal ke liye ek committed step lock karwana.
text: Beet kal ke liye ek cheez jo tum pakka karogi, woh kya hogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Paanch saans pakka karungi aur line phone ke paas chipka lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se commitment mirror karke steadiness anchor karna.
text: Subah uthte hi pehla kaam yeh rakho: line padhna aur tin gahri saans lena, bas itna routine.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab thoda manageable lag raha hai. Pehle jaisa behosh wala nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Micro-consistency ka brief reframe dena.
text: Jab sharir ka yeh thanda padne jaisa ehsaas aaye, yaad rakho yeh overload signal hai, tumhari kami ka proof nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Overload signal wali baat yaad rahegi. Isse panic kam lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Raat ke liye tin-minute close ritual suggest karna.
text: Sone ke pehle tin minute: line padhna, paanch saans, phir paani ka ek glass. Bas.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh kar lungi. Neend se pehle dimaag thoda khali ho jata hai toh accha lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Self-anchor line finalize karwana.
text: Jab dil phir daba ho, tum khud ko kaunsi ek line bolna chahogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bolungi: ek pal, ek kadam. Poora din ek saath nahi jeetna.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Self-chosen anchor line ko validate karna.
text: Seedhi si tumhari line hai, aur isme panic ko pace dene ki samajhdari bhi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab halka feel ho raha hai. Sab theek nahi hua, par sambhalne ka rasta dikh raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se aaj ki de-escalation aur rhythm ko close par anchor karna.
text: Ab tum thodi zameen pakad chuki ho, aur yeh roz ka chhota routine tumhe aage bhi sambhal ke rakhega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dimaag itna bhara hai ki main bas rona chahti hoon. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha, bas andar se toot sa lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sequential overwhelm ko Lens F se mirror karna, stressor detail abhi na khinchte hue.
text: Sunke lagta hai tum abhi bilkul suni-suni si ho, jahan bas rona chahti ho aur dimaag bhara hua hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aisa lag raha hai jaise aatma kaanp gayi ho. Muh khula hai par awaaz hi nahi nikal rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se lambe waqt se chalti akelapan wali thakan mirror karna.
text: Andar ek gehra sunapan saath mein aatma kaanp gayi jaisa darr bhi carry ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Unki baat sunkar aur bhaari ho gayi. Dimaag itna bhara hai ki potey ko school kaise bhejein, yeh bhi clear nahi ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se bache ke future aur abhi ke flood ka implied darr mirror karna.
text: Kuch pal se tum isi heavy zone mein atki ho jahan kuch soojhta hi nahi, aur saath mein potey ka sawal bhi dil par latka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghar mein ignore hokar thak chuki hoon. Agar zyada ro liya toh bol denge natak kar rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue par chhota pause restatement, Lens C se relational darr mirror karna.
text: Ghar ki deewaron ke beech ignore hone ka dard bhi chipka hua lag raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Abhi mujhse mat pucho aage kya hoga. Dimaag itna bhara hai ki bas rote rehne ka mann hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatements ke baad ek grounded sawal se sabse gehra darr surface karna.
text: Jab tum kehti ho mat pucho aage, us pal andar sabse zyada kya darr chipka hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Darr yeh hai ki meri health aur akelepan ka mazaak sa lag raha tha, jaise meri takleef ki value hi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
